<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Metro Junction | Ghazipur</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cinzel:wght@400;600;700;900&family=Cormorant+Garamond:ital,wght@0,300;0,400;0,600;1,300;1,400;1,600&family=Jost:wght@300;400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
:root{
  --gold:#c9a84c;
  --gold2:#f0d080;
  --gold-dim:#7a6030;
  --black:#080808;
  --black2:#0f0f0f;
  --black3:#161616;
  --black4:#1e1e1e;
  --white:#fdf8ee;
  --muted:#8a7f6a;
  --teal:#1a7a72;
  --teal-light:#25b0a5;
}
*{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box;}
html{scroll-behavior:smooth;}
body{background:var(--black);color:var(--white);font-family:'Jost',sans-serif;overflow-x:hidden;}

/* SCROLLBAR */
::-webkit-scrollbar{width:4px;}
::-webkit-scrollbar-track{background:var(--black2);}
::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:var(--gold);}

/* ── NAV ── */
nav{
  position:fixed;top:0;width:100%;z-index:999;
  padding:18px 6%;
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;
  background:rgba(8,8,8,0.95);
  border-bottom:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.25);
  transition:all 0.4s;
}
.logo{
  font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:1.4rem;font-weight:700;
  letter-spacing:5px;color:var(--gold);text-decoration:none;
}
.logo em{color:var(--white);font-style:normal;}
.nav-links{list-style:none;display:flex;gap:36px;}
.nav-links a{
  color:var(--muted);text-decoration:none;font-size:0.72rem;
  letter-spacing:3px;text-transform:uppercase;font-weight:500;
  transition:color 0.3s;
}
.nav-links a:hover{color:var(--gold);}
.btn-reserve{
  background:transparent;border:1px solid var(--gold);
  color:var(--gold);padding:9px 24px;
  font-family:'Jost',sans-serif;font-size:0.72rem;
  letter-spacing:3px;text-transform:uppercase;
  text-decoration:none;cursor:pointer;
  transition:all 0.3s;
}
.btn-reserve:hover{background:var(--gold);color:var(--black);}
.ham{display:none;flex-direction:column;gap:5px;cursor:pointer;}
.ham span{width:22px;height:1px;background:var(--gold);transition:0.3s;}

/* ── HERO ── */
.hero{
  min-height:100vh;
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  text-align:center;
  padding:120px 5% 80px;
  position:relative;overflow:hidden;
  background:var(--black);
}
.hero-overlay{
  position:absolute;inset:0;
  background:
    radial-gradient(ellipse 60% 60% at 50% 40%, rgba(201,168,76,0.06) 0%, transparent 70%),
    radial-gradient(ellipse 80% 40% at 50% 100%, rgba(26,122,114,0.08) 0%, transparent 60%);
  pointer-events:none;
}
/* Decorative corner lines */
.corner{position:absolute;width:80px;height:80px;}
.corner-tl{top:90px;left:5%;border-top:1px solid var(--gold-dim);border-left:1px solid var(--gold-dim);}
.corner-tr{top:90px;right:5%;border-top:1px solid var(--gold-dim);border-right:1px solid var(--gold-dim);}
.corner-bl{bottom:80px;left:5%;border-bottom:1px solid var(--gold-dim);border-left:1px solid var(--gold-dim);}
.corner-br{bottom:80px;right:5%;border-bottom:1px solid var(--gold-dim);border-right:1px solid var(--gold-dim);}

.hero-eyebrow{
  font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;
  font-style:italic;font-size:1.1rem;
  color:var(--gold);letter-spacing:3px;
  margin-bottom:20px;
  animation:fadeUp 1s ease both;
}
.hero h1{
  font-family:'Cinzel',serif;
  font-size:clamp(3.2rem,9vw,8rem);
  font-weight:900;letter-spacing:8px;
  line-height:0.92;color:var(--white);
  animation:fadeUp 1s 0.15s ease both;
}
.hero h1 .gold{
  display:block;
  background:linear-gradient(135deg, var(--gold-dim) 0%, var(--gold2) 45%, var(--gold) 100%);
  -webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;
  background-clip:text;
}
.hero-divider{
  display:flex;align-items:center;gap:16px;
  justify-content:center;margin:28px 0;
  animation:fadeUp 1s 0.3s ease both;
}
.hero-divider::before,.hero-divider::after{
  content:'';width:60px;height:1px;background:var(--gold-dim);
}
.hero-divider span{font-size:0.65rem;letter-spacing:5px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--muted);}
.hero-tagline{
  font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;
  font-size:clamp(1.3rem,3vw,2rem);
  font-style:italic;font-weight:300;
  color:var(--white);letter-spacing:2px;
  margin-bottom:8px;
  animation:fadeUp 1s 0.35s ease both;
}
.hero-sub{
  font-size:0.78rem;color:var(--muted);
  letter-spacing:3px;text-transform:uppercase;
  margin-bottom:44px;
  animation:fadeUp 1s 0.4s ease both;
}
.hero-btns{
  display:flex;gap:16px;justify-content:center;flex-wrap:wrap;
  animation:fadeUp 1s 0.5s ease both;
}
.btn-gold{
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,#7a6030,#c9a84c,#f0d080,#c9a84c);
  background-size:200% 200%;
  color:var(--black);
  padding:14px 38px;
  font-family:'Jost',sans-serif;
  font-size:0.75rem;letter-spacing:3px;text-transform:uppercase;font-weight:600;
  text-decoration:none;border:none;cursor:pointer;
  transition:background-position 0.4s, transform 0.3s;
}
.btn-gold:hover{background-position:right center;transform:translateY(-2px);}
.btn-ghost{
  border:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.4);
  color:var(--gold);
  padding:13px 36px;
  font-family:'Jost',sans-serif;
  font-size:0.75rem;letter-spacing:3px;text-transform:uppercase;
  text-decoration:none;transition:all 0.3s;
}
.btn-ghost:hover{border-color:var(--gold);background:rgba(201,168,76,0.08);}

.hero-stats{
  display:flex;gap:48px;justify-content:center;
  margin-top:60px;
  animation:fadeUp 1s 0.6s ease both;
}
.stat-item{text-align:center;}
.stat-num{
  font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:2rem;font-weight:700;
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--gold-dim),var(--gold2));
  -webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;
  background-clip:text;display:block;
}
.stat-lbl{font-size:0.62rem;letter-spacing:3px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--muted);margin-top:4px;}
.stat-sep{width:1px;background:rgba(201,168,76,0.2);align-self:stretch;}

/* TRACK STRIP */
.track-strip{
  background:var(--black2);
  border-top:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.12);
  border-bottom:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.12);
  padding:20px 0;overflow:hidden;
  position:relative;
}
.track-rail-wrap{position:relative;height:36px;}
.rail{
  position:absolute;bottom:6px;left:0;right:0;height:3px;
  background:repeating-linear-gradient(to right,var(--gold-dim) 0,var(--gold-dim) 18px,transparent 18px,transparent 28px);
}
.sleepers{
  position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;height:18px;
  background:repeating-linear-gradient(to right,transparent 0,transparent 50px,var(--black3) 50px,var(--black3) 56px);
}
.emoji-train{
  position:absolute;bottom:6px;left:-80px;font-size:1.6rem;
  animation:choo 9s linear infinite;
  filter:drop-shadow(0 0 8px rgba(201,168,76,0.5));
}
@keyframes choo{from{left:-80px;}to{left:110%;}}

/* ── ABOUT ── */
.about{background:var(--black2);padding:100px 6%;}
.section-head{margin-bottom:50px;}
.eyebrow{
  font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;
  font-style:italic;font-size:1rem;color:var(--gold);
  letter-spacing:3px;display:block;margin-bottom:10px;
}
.section-title{
  font-family:'Cinzel',serif;
  font-size:clamp(2rem,4.5vw,3.2rem);
  font-weight:700;letter-spacing:3px;color:var(--white);
  line-height:1.1;
}
.section-title .gold{
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--gold-dim),var(--gold2));
  -webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;background-clip:text;
}
.gold-rule{
  display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;margin-top:16px;
}
.gold-rule::before{content:'';width:40px;height:1px;background:var(--gold);}
.gold-rule span{font-size:0.65rem;color:var(--muted);letter-spacing:3px;text-transform:uppercase;}

.about-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:80px;align-items:center;max-width:1200px;margin:0 auto;}
.about-text p{color:var(--muted);line-height:1.9;margin-bottom:18px;font-size:0.95rem;}
.features{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:14px;margin-top:32px;}
.feat{
  border:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.15);
  padding:18px;background:rgba(201,168,76,0.03);
  transition:all 0.3s;
}
.feat:hover{border-color:var(--gold);background:rgba(201,168,76,0.06);}
.feat-icon{font-size:1.4rem;margin-bottom:8px;}
.feat h4{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:0.75rem;letter-spacing:2px;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:4px;text-transform:uppercase;}
.feat p{font-size:0.77rem;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.5;}

.about-imgs{position:relative;height:520px;}
.ai-main{
  position:absolute;right:0;top:0;width:82%;height:380px;
  object-fit:cover;
  border:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.3);
}
.ai-secondary{
  position:absolute;left:0;bottom:0;width:60%;height:240px;
  object-fit:cover;
  border:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.5);
  z-index:2;
}
.float-badge{
  position:absolute;top:20px;left:-8px;z-index:3;
  background:var(--black);
  border:1px solid var(--gold);
  padding:10px 16px;
  font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:0.65rem;
  letter-spacing:3px;color:var(--gold);text-transform:uppercase;
  box-shadow:0 0 30px rgba(201,168,76,0.2);
}

/* ── MENU ── */
.menu-sec{background:var(--black);padding:100px 6%;}
.menu-tabs{display:flex;gap:0;margin:40px 0;flex-wrap:wrap;}
.mtab{
  padding:12px 28px;
  background:transparent;
  border:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.2);
  border-right:none;
  color:var(--muted);
  font-family:'Jost',sans-serif;
  font-size:0.7rem;letter-spacing:3px;text-transform:uppercase;
  cursor:pointer;transition:all 0.3s;
}
.mtab:last-child{border-right:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.2);}
.mtab.active,.mtab:hover{background:rgba(201,168,76,0.08);color:var(--gold);border-color:var(--gold);}
.menu-grid{display:none;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(270px,1fr));gap:1px;background:rgba(201,168,76,0.08);}
.menu-grid.active{display:grid;}
.mcard{
  background:var(--black2);
  padding:24px;
  transition:background 0.3s;
  position:relative;overflow:hidden;
}
.mcard::after{
  content:'';position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;width:0;height:1px;
  background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--gold),transparent);
  transition:width 0.4s;
}
.mcard:hover{background:var(--black3);}
.mcard:hover::after{width:100%;}
.mcard-head{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:flex-start;margin-bottom:10px;}
.mcard-name{
  font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;
  font-size:1.1rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--white);
  flex:1;padding-right:12px;
}
.mcard-price{
  font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:0.9rem;
  color:var(--gold);letter-spacing:1px;white-space:nowrap;
}
.mcard-desc{font-size:0.8rem;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.6;}
.dot{display:inline-block;width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;margin-right:8px;vertical-align:middle;flex-shrink:0;}
.veg{background:#3ddc84;box-shadow:0 0 6px rgba(61,220,132,0.5);}
.nonveg{background:#c0392b;box-shadow:0 0 6px rgba(192,57,43,0.4);}

/* ── GALLERY ── */
.gallery{background:var(--black2);padding:100px 6%;}
.gallery-grid{
  display:grid;
  grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);
  grid-template-rows:280px 220px;
  gap:3px;
  margin-top:50px;max-width:1200px;
}
.gi{overflow:hidden;position:relative;}
.gi img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;transition:transform 0.6s, filter 0.4s;filter:brightness(0.85) saturate(0.9);}
.gi:hover img{transform:scale(1.06);filter:brightness(1) saturate(1.1);}
.gi-overlay{
  position:absolute;inset:0;
  background:linear-gradient(0deg,rgba(0,0,0,0.5) 0%,transparent 60%);
  opacity:0;transition:opacity 0.4s;
  display:flex;align-items:flex-end;padding:16px;
}
.gi:hover .gi-overlay{opacity:1;}
.gi-label{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:0.65rem;letter-spacing:3px;color:var(--gold);text-transform:uppercase;}
.gi:nth-child(1){grid-column:span 2;grid-row:span 1;}
.gi:nth-child(4){grid-column:span 2;}

/* ── REVIEWS ── */
.reviews{background:var(--black);padding:100px 6%;}
.reviews-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(320px,1fr));gap:1px;background:rgba(201,168,76,0.08);margin-top:50px;}
.rcard{background:var(--black);padding:36px;transition:background 0.3s;}
.rcard:hover{background:var(--black2);}
.rstar{color:var(--gold);font-size:0.8rem;letter-spacing:3px;margin-bottom:18px;}
.rtext{
  font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;
  font-style:italic;font-size:1.1rem;
  color:rgba(253,248,238,0.75);
  line-height:1.8;margin-bottom:24px;
}
.rfooter{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;}
.rname{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:0.7rem;letter-spacing:3px;color:var(--gold);text-transform:uppercase;}
.rpills{display:flex;gap:8px;}
.rpill{
  font-size:0.62rem;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;
  border:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.25);
  color:var(--muted);padding:3px 10px;
}

/* ── CONTACT ── */
.contact{background:var(--black2);padding:100px 6%;}
.contact-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:60px;align-items:start;max-width:1200px;margin:50px auto 0;}
.ci{display:flex;gap:20px;align-items:flex-start;padding:24px 0;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.1);}
.ci:last-of-type{border-bottom:none;}
.ci-icon{font-size:1.3rem;flex-shrink:0;width:44px;height:44px;border:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.25);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;}
.ci-label{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:0.62rem;letter-spacing:3px;color:var(--gold);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:6px;}
.ci-val{font-size:0.88rem;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.7;}
.ci-val a{color:var(--muted);text-decoration:none;transition:color 0.3s;}
.ci-val a:hover{color:var(--gold);}
.wa-float{
  display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;
  background:transparent;border:1px solid #25d366;
  color:#25d366;padding:14px 28px;
  font-family:'Jost',sans-serif;
  font-size:0.72rem;letter-spacing:3px;text-transform:uppercase;
  text-decoration:none;margin-top:20px;width:fit-content;
  transition:all 0.3s;
}
.wa-float:hover{background:#25d366;color:var(--black);}
.map-box{
  border:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.2);
  overflow:hidden;
  height:420px;
  position:relative;
}
.map-box::before{
  content:'LOCATION';
  position:absolute;top:-1px;left:20px;
  font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:0.6rem;letter-spacing:4px;
  color:var(--gold);background:var(--black2);
  padding:3px 12px;z-index:10;
}
.map-box iframe{width:100%;height:100%;border:none;filter:grayscale(30%) brightness(0.9);}

/* ── FOOTER ── */
footer{
  background:var(--black);
  border-top:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.2);
  padding:50px 6% 30px;
  text-align:center;
}
.footer-logo{
  font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:1.8rem;
  font-weight:900;letter-spacing:8px;
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--gold-dim),var(--gold2),var(--gold));
  -webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;background-clip:text;
}
.footer-tagline{
  font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-style:italic;
  color:var(--muted);font-size:1rem;margin:10px 0 30px;letter-spacing:1px;
}
.footer-nav{display:flex;gap:28px;justify-content:center;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:30px;}
.footer-nav a{color:var(--muted);text-decoration:none;font-size:0.65rem;letter-spacing:3px;text-transform:uppercase;transition:color 0.3s;}
.footer-nav a:hover{color:var(--gold);}
.footer-rule{width:60px;height:1px;background:var(--gold-dim);margin:0 auto 20px;}
.footer-copy{color:rgba(138,127,106,0.5);font-size:0.68rem;letter-spacing:2px;}

/* ANIMATION */
@keyframes fadeUp{
  from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(30px);}
  to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0);}
}

/* MOBILE */
@media(max-width:800px){
  .nav-links,.btn-reserve{display:none;}
  .nav-links.open{display:flex;flex-direction:column;position:absolute;top:100%;left:0;right:0;background:var(--black2);padding:24px 6%;gap:20px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.2);}
  .ham{display:flex;}
  .about-grid,.contact-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
  .about-imgs{height:360px;}
  .ai-main{width:100%;height:280px;}
  .ai-secondary{width:65%;height:180px;}
  .gallery-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;grid-template-rows:auto;}
  .gi{height:180px !important;}
  .gi:nth-child(1){grid-column:span 2;}
  .gi:nth-child(4){grid-column:span 2;}
  .hero-stats{gap:24px;}
  .menu-tabs{flex-direction:column;}
  .mtab{border-right:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.2);}
  .corner{display:none;}
}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- NAV -->
<nav id="nav">
  <a href="#" class="logo">METRO <em>JUNCTION</em></a>
  <ul class="nav-links" id="navLinks">
    <li><a href="#about">About</a></li>
    <li><a href="#menu">Menu</a></li>
    <li><a href="#gallery">Gallery</a></li>
    <li><a href="#reviews">Reviews</a></li>
    <li><a href="#contact">Contact</a></li>
  </ul>
  <a href="https://wa.me/918005151801" target="_blank" class="btn-reserve">Reserve Now</a>
  <div class="ham" onclick="document.getElementById('navLinks').classList.toggle('open')">
    <span></span><span></span><span></span>
  </div>
</nav>

<!-- HERO -->
<section class="hero">
  <div class="hero-overlay"></div>
  <div class="corner corner-tl"></div>
  <div class="corner corner-tr"></div>
  <div class="corner corner-bl"></div>
  <div class="corner corner-br"></div>
  <div>
    <p class="hero-eyebrow">🚂 &nbsp; Ghazipur's Most Unique Dining Experience</p>
    <h1>
      METRO
      <span class="gold">JUNCTION</span>
    </h1>
    <div class="hero-divider"><span>Ghazipur · UP · Since 2023</span></div>
    <p class="hero-tagline">"Nahi Hai? Khud Se Bana Lena."</p>
    <p class="hero-sub">Gate No. 3, Lanka, Ghazipur &nbsp;·&nbsp; 11 AM – 11 PM · All Week</p>
    <div class="hero-btns">
      <a href="https://wa.me/918005151801?text=Table%20book%20karni%20hai%20Metro%20Junction%20mein" class="btn-gold" target="_blank">📲 &nbsp;Book a Table</a>
      <a href="#menu" class="btn-ghost">View Menu</a>
    </div>
    <div class="hero-stats">
      <div class="stat-item"><span class="stat-num">4.6★</span><span class="stat-lbl">Rating</span></div>
      <div class="stat-sep"></div>
      <div class="stat-item"><span class="stat-num">500+</span><span class="stat-lbl">Happy Guests</span></div>
      <div class="stat-sep"></div>
      <div class="stat-item"><span class="stat-num">3</span><span class="stat-lbl">Dining Sections</span></div>
      <div class="stat-sep"></div>
      <div class="stat-item"><span class="stat-num">12H</span><span class="stat-lbl">Open Daily</span></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- TRAIN STRIP -->
<div class="track-strip">
  <div class="track-rail-wrap">
    <div class="sleepers"></div>
    <div class="rail"></div>
    <div class="emoji-train">🚂</div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ABOUT -->
<section class="about" id="about">
  <div class="about-grid">
    <div>
      <div class="section-head">
        <span class="eyebrow">Our Story</span>
        <h2 class="section-title">A Journey <span class="gold">Through Flavor</span></h2>
        <div class="gold-rule"><span>Ghazipur's First Train-Themed Restaurant</span></div>
      </div>
      <p>Metro Junction is not merely a restaurant — it is an experience. Where food travels to your table aboard a miniature railway, where every seat is a story, and where Ghazipur discovered that dining could be extraordinary.</p>
      <p>From velvet green booths to chandelier-lit ceilings, train-track table runners to mural walls — every inch of Metro Junction was designed to transport you somewhere unforgettable. Whether it's a family dinner, a birthday, or simply Tuesday — arrive, sit, and let the journey begin.</p>
      <div class="features">
        <div class="feat"><div class="feat-icon">🚂</div><h4>Train Delivery</h4><p>Food served via miniature train track — Ghazipur ka pehla aur iklota!</p></div>
        <div class="feat"><div class="feat-icon">🎉</div><h4>Private Bookings</h4><p>Birthday parties, kitty parties &amp; private celebrations</p></div>
        <div class="feat"><div class="feat-icon">🛋️</div><h4>Plush Ambiance</h4><p>Velvet booths, crystal chandeliers &amp; European murals</p></div>
        <div class="feat"><div class="feat-icon">🍽️</div><h4>Diverse Cuisine</h4><p>Indian, South Indian &amp; Dessert — sab kuch ek hi jagah</p></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="about-imgs">
      <div class="float-badge">🚂 Iconic Experience</div>
      <img class="ai-main" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Interior">
      <img class="ai-secondary" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Signature Shake">
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- MENU -->
<section class="menu-sec" id="menu">
  <span class="eyebrow">All Aboard</span>
  <h2 class="section-title">The <span class="gold">Flavour Train</span></h2>
  <div class="menu-tabs">
    <button class="mtab active" onclick="switchMenu('indian',this)">🍛 Indian Junction</button>
    <button class="mtab" onclick="switchMenu('south',this)">🥞 South Indian Junction</button>
    <button class="mtab" onclick="switchMenu('ice',this)">🍦 Ice Cream Junction</button>
  </div>

  <div class="menu-grid active" id="tab-indian">
    <div class="mcard"><div class="mcard-head"><span class="mcard-name"><span class="dot veg"></span>Dal Makhani</span><span class="mcard-price">₹180</span></div><p class="mcard-desc">Slow-simmered black lentils in a rich, buttery tomato gravy. Best enjoyed with freshly baked naan.</p></div>
    <div class="mcard"><div class="mcard-head"><span class="mcard-name"><span class="dot veg"></span>Paneer Butter Masala</span><span class="mcard-price">₹220</span></div><p class="mcard-desc">Soft cottage cheese cubes in a velvety, mildly spiced tomato-cream sauce with aromatic whole spices.</p></div>
    <div class="mcard"><div class="mcard-head"><span class="mcard-name"><span class="dot veg"></span>Veg Dum Biryani</span><span class="mcard-price">₹210</span></div><p class="mcard-desc">Fragrant basmati layered with garden vegetables, saffron water and fried onions. Served with raita.</p></div>
    <div class="mcard"><div class="mcard-head"><span class="mcard-name"><span class="dot nonveg"></span>Chicken Curry</span><span class="mcard-price">₹270</span></div><p class="mcard-desc">Rustic home-style chicken in a bold masala gravy — the kind that warms you from the inside out.</p></div>
    <div class="mcard"><div class="mcard-head"><span class="mcard-name"><span class="dot nonveg"></span>Mutton Rogan Josh</span><span class="mcard-price">₹340</span></div><p class="mcard-desc">Tender mutton slow-cooked in authentic Kashmiri spices. Rich, aromatic, deeply satisfying.</p></div>
  </div>
  <div class="menu-grid" id="tab-south">
    <div class="mcard"><div class="mcard-head"><span class="mcard-name"><span class="dot veg"></span>Masala Dosa</span><span class="mcard-price">₹130</span></div><p class="mcard-desc">Crisp golden crepe with spiced potato filling, served alongside hot sambhar and coconut chutney.</p></div>
    <div class="mcard"><div class="mcard-head"><span class="mcard-name"><span class="dot veg"></span>Idli Sambhar</span><span class="mcard-price">₹100</span></div><p class="mcard-desc">Fluffy steamed rice cakes served with a fragrant lentil broth and fresh coconut chutney.</p></div>
    <div class="mcard"><div class="mcard-head"><span class="mcard-name"><span class="dot veg"></span>Medu Vada</span><span class="mcard-price">₹110</span></div><p class="mcard-desc">Golden, crispy fried lentil donuts — crunchy outside, soft inside. A South Indian classic.</p></div>
    <div class="mcard"><div class="mcard-head"><span class="mcard-name"><span class="dot veg"></span>Onion Uttapam</span><span class="mcard-price">₹140</span></div><p class="mcard-desc">Thick, soft rice pancake topped with caramelised onions, tomatoes and green chillies.</p></div>
    <div class="mcard"><div class="mcard-head"><span class="mcard-name"><span class="dot veg"></span>Rava Dosa</span><span class="mcard-price">₹150</span></div><p class="mcard-desc">Thin, lacy semolina dosa with an irresistible crunch. Quick, light, and completely delicious.</p></div>
  </div>
  <div class="menu-grid" id="tab-ice">
    <div class="mcard"><div class="mcard-head"><span class="mcard-name"><span class="dot veg"></span>Chocolate Sundae</span><span class="mcard-price">₹160</span></div><p class="mcard-desc">Layers of dark chocolate ice cream, warm fudge sauce and whipped cream. Upar se cherry bhi.</p></div>
    <div class="mcard"><div class="mcard-head"><span class="mcard-name"><span class="dot veg"></span>Strawberry Delight</span><span class="mcard-price">₹150</span></div><p class="mcard-desc">Real strawberry ice cream with fresh fruit coulis and a light wafer crumble topping.</p></div>
    <div class="mcard"><div class="mcard-head"><span class="mcard-name"><span class="dot veg"></span>Mango Bliss</span><span class="mcard-price">₹150</span></div><p class="mcard-desc">Alphonso mango ice cream — asli aam ki mithaas frozen into every single scoop.</p></div>
    <div class="mcard"><div class="mcard-head"><span class="mcard-name"><span class="dot veg"></span>Butterscotch Royale</span><span class="mcard-price">₹160</span></div><p class="mcard-desc">Silky butterscotch ice cream with caramel drizzle and golden praline bits on top.</p></div>
    <div class="mcard"><div class="mcard-head"><span class="mcard-name"><span class="dot veg"></span>Signature Choco Shake</span><span class="mcard-price">₹120</span></div><p class="mcard-desc">Our iconic thick chocolate milkshake with chocolate drizzle — wahi wala glass jo famous ho gaya.</p></div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- GALLERY -->
<section class="gallery" id="gallery">
  <span class="eyebrow">Visual Journey</span>
  <h2 class="section-title">Inside <span class="gold">Metro Junction</span></h2>
  <div class="gallery-grid">
    <div class="gi"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Dining Interior"><div class="gi-overlay"><span class="gi-label">The Dining Hall</span></div></div>
    <div class="gi"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Signature Shake"><div class="gi-overlay"><span class="gi-label">Signature Shake</span></div></div>
    <div class="gi"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Cold Coffee"><div class="gi-overlay"><span class="gi-label">Cold Coffee</span></div></div>
    <div class="gi"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Exterior"><div class="gi-overlay"><span class="gi-label">Metro Junction</span></div></div>
    <div class="gi"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Beverages"><div class="gi-overlay"><span class="gi-label">Signature Drinks</span></div></div>
    <div class="gi"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Experience"><div class="gi-overlay"><span class="gi-label">The Experience</span></div></div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- REVIEWS -->
<section class="reviews" id="reviews">
  <span class="eyebrow">Guest Experiences</span>
  <h2 class="section-title">What They <span class="gold">Say</span></h2>
  <div class="reviews-grid">
    <div class="rcard">
      <div class="rstar">★ ★ ★ ★ ☆</div>
      <p class="rtext">"A genuinely good restaurant. The food was excellent, the place is cozy, moderately priced, and the experience is completely different from anything else in the city."</p>
      <div class="rfooter"><span class="rname">Ajay Yadav</span><div class="rpills"><span class="rpill">Food 4/5</span><span class="rpill">Atm 4/5</span></div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="rcard">
      <div class="rstar">★ ★ ★ ★ ★</div>
      <p class="rtext">"Excellent service and outstanding food quality. Authentic, fresh flavors with phenomenal presentation and flawless, attentive staff. A truly premium dining experience."</p>
      <div class="rfooter"><span class="rname">Anjali</span><div class="rpills"><span class="rpill">Food 5/5</span><span class="rpill">Service 5/5</span></div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="rcard">
      <div class="rstar">★ ★ ★ ★ ★</div>
      <p class="rtext">"The concept of food arriving via a miniature train is both entertaining and brilliantly innovative. Metro Junction is a must-visit for anyone who loves food and unforgettable experiences."</p>
      <div class="rfooter"><span class="rname">Vikas Jaiswal</span><div class="rpills"><span class="rpill">Food 4/5</span><span class="rpill">Service 5/5</span></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- CONTACT -->
<section class="contact" id="contact">
  <span class="eyebrow">Find The Station</span>
  <h2 class="section-title">Visit <span class="gold">Us</span></h2>
  <div class="contact-grid">
    <div>
      <div class="ci"><div class="ci-icon">📍</div><div><div class="ci-label">Address</div><div class="ci-val">Gate No. 3, Varanasi–Gorakhpur Highway,<br>Nauka Pura, Lanka, Ghazipur, UP — 233001</div></div></div>
      <div class="ci"><div class="ci-icon">⏰</div><div><div class="ci-label">Hours</div><div class="ci-val">11:00 AM — 11:00 PM<br>Open All 7 Days, Every Week</div></div></div>
      <div class="ci"><div class="ci-icon">📞</div><div><div class="ci-label">Phone & WhatsApp</div><div class="ci-val"><a href="tel:+918005151801">+91 80051 51801</a></div></div></div>
      <a class="wa-float" href="https://wa.me/918005151801?text=Table%20book%20karni%20hai%20Metro%20Junction%20mein" target="_blank">
        <svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M17.472 14.382c-.297-.149-1.758-.867-2.03-.967-.273-.099-.471-.148-.67.15-.197.297-.767.966-.94 1.164-.173.199-.347.223-.644.075-.297-.15-1.255-.463-2.39-1.475-.883-.788-1.48-1.761-1.653-2.059-.173-.297-.018-.458.13-.606.134-.133.298-.347.446-.52.149-.174.198-.298.298-.497.099-.198.05-.371-.025-.52-.075-.149-.669-1.612-.916-2.207-.242-.579-.487-.5-.669-.51-.173-.008-.371-.01-.57-.01-.198 0-.52.074-.792.372-.272.297-1.04 1.016-1.04 2.479 0 1.462 1.065 2.875 1.213 3.074.149.198 2.096 3.2 5.077 4.487.709.306 1.262.489 1.694.625.712.227 1.36.195 1.871.118.571-.085 1.758-.719 2.006-1.413.248-.694.248-1.289.173-1.413-.074-.124-.272-.198-.57-.347m-5.421 7.403h-.004a9.87 9.87 0 01-5.031-1.378l-.361-.214-3.741.982.998-3.648-.235-.374a9.86 9.86 0 01-1.51-5.26c.001-5.45 4.436-9.884 9.888-9.884 2.64 0 5.122 1.03 6.988 2.898a9.825 9.825 0 012.893 6.994c-.003 5.45-4.437 9.884-9.885 9.884m8.413-18.297A11.815 11.815 0 0012.05 0C5.495 0 .16 5.335.157 11.892c0 2.096.547 4.142 1.588 5.945L.057 24l6.305-1.654a11.882 11.882 0 005.683 1.448h.005c6.554 0 11.89-5.335 11.893-11.893a11.821 11.821 0 00-3.48-8.413z"/></svg>
        WhatsApp Reservation
      </a>
    </div>
    <div class="map-box">
      <iframe src="https://maps.google.com/maps?q=25.5835,83.5677&z=15&output=embed" allowfullscreen loading="lazy" title="Metro Junction"></iframe>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<footer>
  <div class="footer-logo">METRO JUNCTION</div>
  <p class="footer-tagline">"Nahi Hai? Khud Se Bana Lena."</p>
  <nav class="footer-nav">
    <a href="#about">About</a><a href="#menu">Menu</a><a href="#gallery">Gallery</a><a href="#reviews">Reviews</a><a href="#contact">Contact</a>
  </nav>
  <div class="footer-rule"></div>
  <p class="footer-copy">© 2025 Metro Junction Restaurant · Ghazipur, Uttar Pradesh</p>
</footer>

<script>
function switchMenu(tab, btn) {
  document.querySelectorAll('.menu-grid').forEach(g => g.classList.remove('active'));
  document.querySelectorAll('.mtab').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
  document.getElementById('tab-' + tab).classList.add('active');
  btn.classList.add('active');
}
window.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
  document.getElementById('nav').style.boxShadow = window.scrollY > 60 ? '0 4px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.8)' : 'none';
});
const obs = new IntersectionObserver(entries => {
  entries.forEach(e => {
    if(e.isIntersecting){ e.target.style.opacity='1'; e.target.style.transform='translateY(0)'; }
  });
},{threshold:0.08});
document.querySelectorAll('.mcard,.rcard,.feat,.ci,.gi').forEach(el => {
  el.style.opacity='0'; el.style.transform='translateY(18px)'; el.style.transition='opacity 0.5s ease, transform 0.5s ease';
  obs.observe(el);
});
</script>
</body>
</html>
